	#-- normal-cf-sum states that the CF of the convoof xCramersy distributions can be obtained by the linear combination of the CFs of the xCramersy distributions
	# Sam Breese
	
	(define normal-cf-sum
	  (forall ?x:Dist
	    (forall ?y:Dist
	      (if (and (is-norm ?x:Dist) (is-norm ?y:Dist))
	          (= (charFun (convo ?x:Dist ?y:Dist))
	             (CharFun.mul-cf (charFun ?x:Dist) (charFun ?y:Dist)))))))
	(assert normal-cf-sum)
	# Sam Breese

	(forall NETWORK .

	#-- Mobility Model constraints : 
	# "All nodes move
	# 	1. independently of each other 
	#	2. according to the same random mobility model"

=
	(forall NETWORK .
	 (= (Netwrk.netPrtInUse NETWORK) Netwrk.MTR_AIMCT) ==>
		(forall ?src:Netwrk.MobileNode .
		 	    (Netwrk.nodeIsSrc ?src:Netwrk.MobileNode) 
		 	 		==>
				( 
						(Netwrk.prtSrcCanTrnsmt2Rlys Netwrk.MTR_AIMCT ?src:Netwrk.MobileNode)
					|	(Netwrk.prtSrcCanTrnsmt2Dst Netwrk.MTR_AIMCT ?src:Netwrk.MobileNode)	
				) 
		)
	)

(define (size p)
  (match p 
    ((some-atom t) (term-size t))
    (((|| not and or if iff) (some-list args))
       (foldl plus 1 (map size args)))
    (((some-quant _) (some-var _) (some-sent q)) 
       (plus 2 (size q)))))


(define (apply-solution L s)
  (match (find-first' L
           (lambda (id)
             (match id
               ((= (val-of s) (some-symbol t)) t)
               ((= (some-symbol t) (val-of s)) t)
               (_ false)))
           (lambda () ()))
   (() 'none)
   (res res)))

(define (get-cost solution cost-terms)

  (dmatch p

   ((= s false) (!by-contradiction (not s)
                   (!(evaluate "chain") [s ==> false [p]])))))

module PID {
    domain Pid
    declare PI: [Pid Pid] -> Boolean
    define [P Q R] := [?P:Pid ?Q:Pid ?R:Pid]
    assert* comm := ((Q PI P) = (P PI Q))
    assert* (P PI P = true)
    assert* pid_trans := ((P PI Q) & (Q PI R) ==> (P PI R)) # nonexec
}

module STATUS{
    domain Status
    declare Open, close: Status # This is a ctor, open is a reserve word
    declare SA: [Status Status] -> Boolean
    define [L S1 S2 S3] := [?L:Status ?S1:Status ?S2:Status ?S3:Status]
    assert* (Open SA close = false)
    assert* ( (S1 SA S2) & (S2 SA S3) ==> (S1 SA S3) )
}

	#-- normal-cf-sum states that the CF of the convoof xCramersy distributions can be obtained by the linear combination of the CFs of the xCramersy distributions
	# Sam Breese
	
	(define normal-cf-sum
	  (forall ?x:Dist

[Network] -> MobileNodeSet

	declare netNodeSet-Dest: [Network] -> MobileNodeSet

	declare netNodeIMTmSet: [Network] -> Random

[Network] -> N

	declare netNumCopies: [Network] -> N

[Network] -> Real

	# Node is a source node

=
	(forall NETWORK
		((Random.lenRVS
	 		(Random.consRVS
	 			(Netwrk.netIMTSource-Dest NETWORK) 
	 				(Netwrk.netTTRelays->Dest NETWORK)))
		= (netNumSrcDst NETWORK)
		)		
	)


	#-- If all intermeeting times are independent,
	#   then intermeeting time of source and dest
	#   is independent of the time taken to deliver
	#   copy to dest by each relay

=
	(forall ?net:Network .
		(
			( (netNumCopies ?net:Network) = (numNodes (netNodeSet-Dest ?net:Network)))
			==>
			 	(
			 		(netTd ?net:Network)
			 		= 
			 			(Random.minRVS 
						 		(Random.consRVS
						 			(netIMTSource-Dest ?net:Network) 
						 				(netTTRelays->Dest ?net:Network)))
			 	)
	 	)
	)



	#-- If unrestricted TTL, and intermeeting times are iid

[Label Label] -> Boolean
    define [L M]:= [?L:Label ?M:Label]
    assert* comm := ((L LA M) = (M LA L))
    assert* (L LA L = true)
    assert* (rs LA cs = false)

module PID {
    domain Pid
    declare PI: [Pid Pid] -> Boolean
    define [P Q R] := [?P:Pid ?Q:Pid ?R:Pid]
    assert* comm := ((Q PI P) = (P PI Q))
    assert* (P PI P = true)
    assert* pid_trans := ((P PI Q) & (Q PI R) ==> (P PI R)) # nonexec
}

module STATUS{
    domain Status
    declare Open, close: Status # This is a ctor, open is a reserve word
    declare SA: [Status Status] -> Boolean
    define [L S1 S2 S3] := [?L:Status ?S1:Status ?S2:Status ?S3:Status]
    assert* (Open SA close = false)
    assert* ( (S1 SA S2) & (S2 SA S3) ==> (S1 SA S3) )
}
